---
name: Research brief
about: Track bounded network or provider research.
title: "[research] "
labels: research
assignees: ""
---

## Question

What concrete role or claim needs review?

## Candidate System

ICP, Akash, Golem, Bittensor, Ethereum/L2, storage network, local hardware, or
another named system.

## Functional Role

Registry, coordination, batch compute, settlement, storage, reputation,
benchmarking, or refusal.

## Evidence Needed

List docs, benchmarks, API references, price data, or prototype tests.

## Risk

Privacy, cost, lock-in, availability, legal, safety, or integrity pressure.
